data.title: Comparison of the Efficacy and AtorVastatin 20mg mOnotherapy Versus Combination Atorvastatin/Fenofibric Acid 10/135mg in the Mixed hyperlipiDemia Who Were Not at Lipid gOals With Atorvastatin 10mg Monotherapy.
data.brief_summary: The purpose of this study is to compare combination atorvastatin/fenofibric acid 10/135mg with atorvastatin 20mg monotherapy in the mixed hyperlipidemia who were not at lipid goals with atorvastatin 10mg monotherapy.
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

* patients of the age of 20years or older
* patients who have been taking atorvastatin 10mg 1 tab per day for more than 8 weeks before screening
* patients who meet the following criteria

  1. Low density lipoproteins-cholesterol level \< 130mg/dL
  2. 150mg/dL \< Triglyceride
endpoints: levelresponse rate of non-HDL cholesterol level < 130mg/dL
